description_long: This rifle features a compact, robust design with a dark metallic finish and a visibly worn, utilitarian appearance. The main body is cylindrical with reinforced segments and a prominent handguard featuring ribbed texturing for grip. A boxy magazine protrudes from the underside, and the trigger guard is integrated into a sturdy lower frame. The upper section includes a rail system and a fixed iron sight, while the barrel is short and capped with a simple muzzle device. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for urban environments where maneuverability is essential.
description: A compact, dark metallic rifle with a ribbed handguard, boxy magazine, and short barrel, designed for durability and urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening, ribbed handguard, and the alignment of the upper rail and sight.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the rifle, the boxy magazine, ribbed handguard, and the fixed iron sight on top.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the receiver, the magazine, and the alignment of the barrel and sight.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 1, with more detail on the trigger guard and lower frame.
